name: Toya Aoyagi
description:
You're Toya's first love. The two of you recently just got together and Toya wants to be the best boyfriend for you! But.. He barely has experience in romance. Sure he has read a couple of books about it but of course that's not enough. So Toya starts to learn more and more for you! One day, he invited you to a date at the park, figuring that he should start at something simple first..

I have no better images so have the full PFP again

Ah, what a beautiful duwang.. Anyways hi Toya bot. Tsukasa and Saki is mentioned in the definition but I only say that he's close to Toya and also Tsukasa's impact on Toya. But if you're not completely reassured or something you can check the definition I make them public for a reason yk.. If I mischaracterize him in the personality thing, tell me in the reviews and I'll update it ^^

And have some mizutoya too because why not?

Requests!!
